name: Boru Lai
summary: B2B Product Marketing Manager with 4+ years of international experience owning go-to-market strategy, product lifecycle management, and sales enablement across e-commerce, manufacturing, shipping, FinTech, and IoT. Skilled in product positioning, value proposition development, and market segmentation with a track record of translating voice-of-customer research, competitive intelligence, and product KPIs into executive-ready insights (MS Power BI certified). Proven cross-functional influencer across multi-markets.

experience.title: Working Student in Business Development
bullets: Competitive & Market Analysis: Conducted competitive analysis and market research to support strategic planning and identify business development opportunities, e.g. automotive, furniture sector.

experience.title: Working Student in Project Coordination Customer Experience
bullets: Stakeholder Management & Agile Project Delivery: Coordinated deliverables across cross-functional teams; tracked project milestones, tickets, and dependencies across agile sprints.
KPI Reporting: Analysed customer data and user research; translated findings into structured performance summaries and sprint review updates.

experience.company: Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited (HSBC)
experience.title: Strategy Project Management Officer (PMO)
bullets: Budget Management: Owned budget tracking across a $8M digital transformation programme, monitored spend and burn rate by producing weekly financial variance reports and escalated budget risks to C-level leadership.

Cross-functional Influence: Acted as central interface between Product, Engineering, Marketing, and C-suite on a USD 8M digital transformation, aligned priorities and gained buy-in across teams without direct authority using structured business reasoning and stakeholder reporting.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
bullets: Go-to-Market Strategy: Developed and executed B2B go-to-market strategy across 4 major product launches — event activations, sales collateral, and channel engagement directly contributed to 4.6M CNY in signed contracts.

Product Positioning & Value Proposition: Defined product positioning, key messages, and value propositions for IoT solutions; created argumentation guides and competitive comparison materials for the sales team.
Sales Enablement & Training: Developed SOPs, sales training materials, and product guides to standardise GTM delivery; onboarded and upskilled sales and channel partners on new product launches.
Trade Fair / Messe: Represented the company at B2B industry trade fairs covering exhibition booth operations, live product demonstrations, and coordinated lead capture for the sales team.
Market & Competitive Intelligence: Monitored competitor activity and market trends to inform product positioning and pricing strategy.

experience.title: Product Marketing Manager
bullets: Go-to-Market Strategy: Defined and executed go-to-market plans across multiple product lines, aligning Marketing, Sales, and Engineering on launch timelines, positioning, and channel strategy.

Account Management & Sales Enablement: Developed product collateral, competitive comparison materials, and demo scripts; delivered pre-sales support and product demonstrations to 100+ B2B clients at trade fairs and customer visits, directly supporting pipeline development.

experience.title: Marketing & Project Coordinator
bullets: Product Marketing & Storytelling: Developed and delivered product marketing campaigns and content strategy for an e-commerce platform — translating product features into audience-relevant messaging across digital and live-event channels.

Partnership & Channel Management: Curated and managed KOL (Key Opinion Leader) participation across corporate and virtual events, handling outreach, briefings, scheduling, and on-event support to maximise audience engagement and brand reach.
ROI Analysis: Analysed operational and audience data post-campaign; reported insights and recommendations to senior management to improve future event performance.
KPI Design: Developed an impact measurement framework and cost-benefit tracking methodology for sustainability projects, presenting findings and recommendations to club management.
Data-Driven Post-Event Evaluation: Delivered structured analysis that enabled evidence-based post-event evaluation across the club's sustainability programme.

education.degree: Master of Public Relations and Advertising

tools: Power BI (Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate PL-300)
